title: WinniePat's Casino plugin
description: Slot Machines, Double Or Nothing, Roulette
body:
WinniePat's Casino plugin – Minecraft 1.21.4

Take your Minecraft server to the next level with WinniePat's Casino, a fun gambling plugin! Perfect for minigames, economy servers, or just adding some excitement to your world, this plugin lets players bet, win, and lose in a variety of games.

Features:

Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21.4 and Paper/Spigot servers.

Multiple gambling games including coin slots, double or nothing, and roulette.

Easy-to-use commands and player-friendly messages.

You need to integrate with server economy plugins (Vault and EssentialsX) for seamless transactions.

Admin controls to manage games, restrict usage, or adjust odds.

Bring some risk and reward into your server and watch your players compete for glory and treasure!
